languages.text: "Если удастся захватить его живым, это будет бесценный объект для изучения".
"If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."
languages.original_text: "Если удастся захватить его живым, это будет бесценный объект для изучения".

traits.locale_text: "If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."
"If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."
"If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."
"If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."

languages.text: "Wenn wir sie lebend fangen könnten, hätten wir ein unbezahlbares Studienobjekt."
languages.original_text: "If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."

traits.locale_text: "Wenn wir sie lebend fangen könnten, hätten wir ein unbezahlbares Studienobjekt."

languages.text: « S'il peut être capturé en vie, il fera un cobaye précieux pour nos recherches. »
languages.original_text: "If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."

traits.locale_text: « S'il peut être capturé en vie, il fera un cobaye précieux pour nos recherches. »

languages.text: «Si es posible capturarlo con vida, el espécimen sería valiosísimo como objeto de estudio».
languages.original_text: "If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."

traits.locale_text: «Si es posible capturarlo con vida, el espécimen sería valiosísimo como objeto de estudio».

languages.text: "Canlı yakalanabilirse inceleme için paha biçilmez bir numune olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "If it can be captured alive, it would be an invaluable specimen for study."

traits.locale_text: "Canlı yakalanabilirse inceleme için paha biçilmez bir numune olacaktır."

languages.text: “如果能活捉它，那将是无价的研究样本。”
